name: saga_nodes_fancy
description: Four ornate level-map node buttons, one premium family with carved gold frames: CURRENT — radiant teal gem tile in a gold ornament frame with a glowing rim and tiny crown on top; DEFAULT — cream porcelain tile in a simple gold frame; LOCKED — the cream tile wrapped by a gold chain with a chunky padlock; COMPLETE — the cream tile with an embedded gold star and laurel corners.
prompt_extra: the tile face stays plain and empty in the center (a level number is rendered over it by the game); identical tile geometry across all four cells
